svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, sans-serif
svg.title: Beads v1.1.0 Operational Cheatsheet
svg.desc: A dense single-image SVG cheatsheet covering all 14 product areas of Beads v1.1.0. Includes install, issue model, lifecycle, dependency graph, queries, sync, agent workflow, formulas, protos, molecules, wisps, bonds, gates, and operations. Every command is valid for v1.1.0.
svg.text: Storage: Dolt (source of truth) · Export: .beads/issues.jsonl · Sync: refs/dolt/data · No third-party hosting required

g.text: graph for AI agents and humans. Beads gives
Dolt SQL database inside .beads/ is the
single source of truth. Two modes:
bd setup codex | claude | factory | cursor
WARNING: bd edit opens $EDITOR — don't use
in agents; use bd update flags instead.
blocks # B waits for A to close
conditional-blocks # B runs if A fails
waits-for # B waits for A's children
Sync rides refs/dolt/data on git remote.
· Do not use JSONL as the sync protocol
· Do not run bd import during normal flow
· Use Dolt hosting first, not third-party
prime injects prime-time context for the
steps: id, title, type, needs, depends_on,
LIMIT: bond points are authoring metadata
bd backup init /path/ && bd backup sync
bd compact · bd flatten # history shrink
Back up first; one designated clone
bd dolt pull && bd dolt push
bd prime # capture memory before handoff

svg.text: Beads v1.1.0 repository (github.com/gastownhall/beads) · Local checkout @ commit 8e4e59d39f3459a43cf21a3236a13eca4dd874f7
Advanced-feature study summarized in docs/beads/capabilities.md · Verified portable: no remote assets
